Donkey
Winding Flag Ring

Once in a while, throws a grenade at the enemy with the highest spell power. On hit, the grenade explodes and deals 350000 physical damage to the target and all enemies in a small radius around it. All affected enemies are stunned for 3 sec, and the damage they take from burning is increased by 35% for 3 sec. Also, all affected enemies catch fire. The burning units take 250000 magic damage and have their healing rate reduced by 35% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
